notes: Quiet window — only one item met the bar. Good signal that the team's channels are clearing things in real time.

items.title: Stale cross-team dependency on DEP-555
items.description: Two of our tickets reference DEP-555 (owned by the API Platform team). DEP-555 hasn't been updated in 18 days. Our tickets are sitting in a Blocked state.
items.why_help_matters: An IC-to-IC ping has been tried twice. The next ping from Taylor would be a third in a row, which is awkward for them. Manager-to-manager escalates the signal without escalating the relationship.
items.business_benefit: Unblocking DEP-555 unblocks two downstream tickets on our side. Faster resolution also keeps the API Platform team's silence from becoming a habitual pattern.
items.suggested_action: Manager-to-manager ping to the API Platform lead: 'Two of ours are blocked on DEP-555 — realistic ETA or can we help pick it up?'
